enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to All-India Financial Institutions namely
Export-Import Bank of India ('EXIM Bank'), National Bank for Agriculture and Rural
Development ('NABARD'), Small Industries Development Bank of India ('SIDBI'),
National Housing Bank ('NHB') and National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and
Development ('NaBFID'), hereinafter collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and
individually as an 'AIFI', to the extant the directions contained herein are not
inconsistent with the statutory provisions or instructions issued thereunder.
enriched_requirements.object: Financial Institutions namely Export-Import Bank of India ('EXIM Bank'), National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Developmen

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Director' means a director appointed on the Board of an AIFI.
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'Director' means a director appointed on the Board of an AIFI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All expressions shall have the same meaning as have been assigned to them
under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Banking Regulation Act, 1949,
or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto, or Glossary of Terms
published by the RBI, or as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or any statutory m

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall have a Board-approved policy relating to courses / certifications
required for specialised areas of operations as laid out in paragraph 15 and
paragraph 16 of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: relating to courses / certifications required for specialised areas of operations as laid out in paragraph 15 and paragra

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of an AIFI shall extend facility of deferment of option premium only
after conducting due diligence of users in accordance with its Board approved
policy in this regard, as set out in paragraph 11 of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: of option premium only after conducting due diligence of users in accordance with its Board approved policy in this regar

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI may set up an apex Audit Committee of the Board (ACB) consisting of
about five Directors;
enriched_requirements.object: Audit Committee of the Board (ACB) consisting of about five Directors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
one or more of such Directors may be Chartered
Accountants or have experience in management, finance, accountancy and
audit systems etc.
enriched_requirements.object: have experience in management, finance, accountancy and audit systems etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Provided that directors representing staff, if any, may not be included in the ACB.
The ACB may meet, at least, once a quarter but not less than six times a year.
enriched_requirements.object: a quarter but not less than six times a year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The functions of ACB may include, inter alia, the following:
(1) providing direction as also overseeing the operation of the total audit
functions of the AIFI.
enriched_requirements.object: following: (1) providing direction as also overseeing the operation of the total audit functions of the AIFI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It may also
focus on the follow-up on frauds and major areas of house-keeping;
enriched_requirements.object: follow-up on frauds and major areas of house-keeping
auditors before the finalisation of the annual/semi-annual financial accounts and reports

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI may, at its discretion, defer the premium on plain vanilla options and
forex option structures sold by it to users subject to the following conditions:
(1) the AIFI shall carry out necessary due diligence with regard to the ability
of users to adhere to the premium payment schedule, in accordance
with its Board approved policy in this regard, before extending this
facility to the users;
enriched_requirements.object: diligence with regard to the ability of users to adhere to the premium payment schedule, in accordance with its Board approved

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(3) premium shall be received uniformly over the maturity of the contract
and periodicity of such payment shall be at least once in a quarter.
enriched_requirements.object: the maturity of the contract and periodicity of such payment shall be at least once in a quarter

conditions: in case of forex option structures
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, in case of forex option structures, the above facility shall be
available only if the liability of the users never exceeds the net premium payable
to the AIFI under any scenario.
enriched_requirements.object: the liability of the users never exceeds the net premium payable to the AIFI under any scenario

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that, the above facility shall not be available to an intermediary
AIFI which does not have its own option book but offers the product to corporate
clients on a completely covered basis since intermediary AIFI itself is not a
'user'.
enriched_requirements.object: intermediary AIFI which does not have its own option book but offers the product to corporate clients on a completely covered basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that, options and option structures shall continue to be
governed by instructions on suitability and appropriateness laid down in Master
Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Market-makers in OTC Derivatives)
Directions, 2021.
enriched_requirements.object: by instructions on suitability and appropriateness laid down in Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Market-makers in OTC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall report its secondary market transactions in corporate bonds done
in OTC market on FIMMDA's reporting platform.
enriched_requirements.object: transactions in corporate bonds done in OTC market on FIMMDA's reporting platform

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The bank may refer detailed operational guidelines in this regard
issued by FIMMDA.
enriched_requirements.object: in this regard issued by FIMMDA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI, if not already registered with US authorities as per the Government of
India's Inter-Governmental Agreement (IGA) with US to implement Foreign
Accounts Tax Compliance Act (FATCA), shall register itself and obtain a Global
Intermediary Identification Number (GIIN).
enriched_requirements.object: a Global Intermediary Identification Number (GIIN)

conditions:
where an agreement under Model 1 has been reached in
substance
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, an AIFI having overseas branches in jurisdictions covered under
different FATCA frameworks is required to take appropriate registration actions
as under:
(1) An AIFI having overseas branches in Model 1 jurisdictions, including those
jurisdictions where an agreement under Model 1 has been reached in
substance, and is yet to register with US authorities, shall register itself
and obtain a GIIN.
enriched_requirements.object: a GIIN

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) An AIFI having overseas branches in a jurisdiction having IGA 2
agreement or in a jurisdiction that does not have an IGA but permits
financial institutions to register and agree to an FFI agreement, may
register with US authorities and obtain a GIIN, if not already registered, to
avoid potential withholding under FATCA.
enriched_requirements.object: and obtain a GIIN

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) An AIFI having overseas branches in a jurisdiction that does not have an
IGA and does not permit financial institutions to register and agree to an
FFI agreement may not register and their overseas branches would
eventually be subject to withholding under FATCA.
enriched_requirements.object: branches would eventually be subject to withholding under FATCA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall identify specialised areas for certification of the staff manning key
responsibilities.
enriched_requirements.object: certification of the staff manning key responsibilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While an AIFI shall retain the flexibility to require certification for
any area of work, it shall make acquiring of a certificate course mandatory for
staff before their posting in the following areas, as applicable:
(1) treasury operations - dealers, mid-office operations;
enriched_requirements.object: require certification for any area of work, it shall make acquiring of a certificate course mandatory for staff before their

conditions: Provided that if an employee has already acquired relevant graduate
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that if an employee has already acquired relevant graduate, diploma
and certificate courses offered by reputed universities, the same may also be
considered as an accreditation/ certification.
enriched_requirements.object: already acquired relevant graduate, diploma and certificate courses offered by reputed universities, the same may also be considere

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall identify the courses / certifications, from those recognised by IBA
as meeting certification requirements for different work areas mentioned above,
those that are suitable for its operations and put in place a Board-approved
policy, mandating obtainment of such certifications by its employees working in
the respective areas.
enriched_requirements.object: certifications, from those recognised by IBA as meeting certification requirements for different work areas mentioned above, th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: An AIFI shall put in place 'staff rotation' policy.
enriched_requirements.object: rotation' policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall require its internal auditors and concurrent auditors to examine the
implementation of policy for 'staff rotation' and point out instances of breaches
irrespective of apparent justifications for non-compliance, if any.
enriched_requirements.object: and concurrent auditors to examine the implementation of policy for 'staff rotation' and point out instances of breaches irrespective of apparent justifications for non-compliance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the decisions taken / transactions effected by officers and staff not
rotated as per policy shall also be subjected to comprehensive examination by
the internal auditors and concurrent auditors, and the finding thereon should be
documented.
enriched_requirements.object: comprehensive examination by the internal auditors and concurrent auditors, and the finding thereon should be documented

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
